creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
% pkg info remmina | grep epository
        repository     : FreeBSD
% bectl list | grep N
n264312-789df254cc9e-d NR     /          418G  2023-08-02 09:11
% 


<https://gitlab.com/Remmina/Remmina/-/wikis/Usage/Remmina-debugging> exists, however <https://www.freshports.org/net/remmina/#config> there's no debug option. 

<https://www.freshports.org/net/freerdp/>

----

As I suspected: not reproducible from home (where it's impossible for me to reach the network of RDP servers with which I normally work). 

For these unreachable servers, I _can_ make attempts without crashing. Connections culminate with e.g. (by address) lost connection or (by name) address not found. 

----

I say "suspected" because I had the same symptom, or very similar, in the past (before the major update to OpenSSL) and did not bother to report the bug. IIRC these past crashes were both: 

a) consistently reproducible; and 

b) consistently avoidable by not using a particular network service on the FreeBSD side (I can not recall whether the then crashes were with eduroam or with the wired network). 

This morning's crashes were with eduroam, which is always available to me at work, although I rarely use it. 

If OpenSSL issue 14392 is not entirely an explanation for crashes with 1.4.30_1 (not crashing with 1.4.30 and a slightly earlier set of packages), then let's consider point (b).
